description: A pair of round-toed black casual shoes with white accents, has low-top styling and central lace-upsCanvas upper with overlays, eyelet and stitched details and a reinforced heel collarSoft tongue and inner, branding on the tongueCushioned footbed with branding on the heelThick midsole with foxing on the forefoot and branding on the backfootTextured outsole with patterned groovesWarranty: 3 months for manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
